note: Bumped 2026-05-14 from 228 KB → 280 KB cap to absorb Ajv 8 + ajv-formats (~31 KB gz). Ajv is pulled in through `@ggui-ai/protocol`'s `validateContextData` call site in `src/context-observer.ts` — the iframe runs the same closed-shape validator the server does, so closed-shape rejects (`done` vs declared `completed`, etc.) surface symmetrically at both ends. Pre-Ajv measurement was 259.65 KB gz on this slice; cap = measured + ~8% headroom. C8 Commit 3/3 prior baseline 190.20 KB gz called out three load-bearing contributors (React 19 ~115 KB, zod + JSON-Schema processors ~60 KB, protocol root-barrel leak ~15 KB); Ajv joins as a fourth (~31 KB) — accepted as the canonical validator's per-surface cost. Options to tighten in future slices: subpath-export contract-validator behind `@ggui-ai/protocol/validation` so iframe can opt-in to a slim observer-only path (and drop Ajv at the runtime for production iframes where the server is the authoritative validator); tree-shake openrouter-models behind a subpath (separate protocol refactor).
